title: 7 Herbal Teas For Dry Nose
description: Echinacea purpurea teas contains alkylamides and caffeic acid derivatives as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe. Alkylamides also have immunomodulatory effects, which can boost the body's natural defenses against infections that may be causing congestion.
